kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=mysession, url=http://127.0.0.1:8000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:8000/app/videogames path_url=/app/videogames headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://127.0.0.1:8000/app/videogames status=200, reason=OK headers={'date': 'Fri, 15 May 2026 15:10:52 GMT', 'server': 'uvicorn', 'content-length': '483', 'content-type': 'application/json'} body=[{"id":1,"name":"Red Dead Redemption 2","releaseDate":"2018-10-26","reviewScore":97,"category":"Action-Adventure","rating":"Mature"},{"id":2,"name":"Ghost of Tsushima","releaseDate":"2020-07-17","reviewScore":83,"category":"Action-Adventure","rating":"Mature"},{"id":3,"name":"Valorant","releaseDate":"2020-06-02","reviewScore":80,"category":"Tactical Shooter","rating":"Teen"},{"id":4,"name":"Raft","releaseDate":"2022-06-20","reviewScore":85,"category":"Survival","rating":"Teen"}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.name: TC2: Creates a new video game (POST)

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:8000/app/videogames path_url=/app/videogames headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '132'} body=b'{"id": 5980, "name": "AutoTest Game 5980", "releaseDate": "2024-05-14", "reviewScore": 65, "category": "Action", "rating": "Mature"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.name: TC3: Returns the detail of a single game by ID(GET)

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:8000/app/videogames/5980 path_url=/app/videogames/5980 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.name: TC4:Update an existing video game by specifying a new body(PUT)

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: PUT On Session
kw.msg: PUT Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:8000/app/videogames/5980 path_url=/app/videogames/5980 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '129'} body=b'{"id": 5980, "name": "CounterStrike2", "releaseDate": "2022-01-01", "reviewScore": 85, "category": "Shooter", "rating": "Mature"}'
kw.doc: Sends a PUT request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Dictionaries Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given dictionaries are not equal.

test.name: TC5: Deletes a video game by ID (DELETE)

kw.name: DELETE On Session
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:8000/app/videogames/5980 path_url=/app/videogames/5980 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects
